rlp22jefjlloqsq302rmbpktvg.summary: You lack documents explicitly labeled 'EA offsite meetings' in your work notes—forcing a reliance on recent Tech BOD, office hours, and leadership check-ins to build your standup strategy. You must address critical operational bottlenecks—specifically the stalled Resiliency/NART pilots and the massive scaling demands of the P&C sandbox environment. Focus your efforts on enforcing developer accountability for AI tool usage, preparing for the June member rollout of Project IVA, and driving the transition toward a highly technical, hands-on architecture discipline.
tasks: Schedule the alignment meeting with Deepak to resolve stalled Resiliency and NART pilot processes.
Establish consumption-based chargebacks for high-end LLM models to curb rising infrastructure costs.
Partner with Michelle Carter to resolve the outstanding MII and residency team issues before Thursday.
Initiate conversations with the Pay Claim team to deliver Grafana dashboards with 10–15 real-time metrics within two weeks.
Implement a formal business engagement process to hold partners accountable for upstream architectural requirements.
rlp22jefjlloqsq302rmbpktvg.title: Tech fellow standup

2fk88oufebop7au89hmqmgtets.summary: Your work notes contain no direct records of a past meeting with Deepak, calibration discussions, or the Unsworth departure—leaving these topics without historical documentation in your files. The only reference to Deepak is an outstanding action item from late May to schedule an alignment meeting on the stalled Resilience pilot. You must prepare to address these unrecorded items directly with Claire—focusing on the team impact of the Unsworth exit and the current status of performance calibrations.
tasks: Schedule the outstanding alignment meeting with Deepak and key stakeholders regarding the stalled Resilience pilot.
Compile performance metrics for your direct reports to prepare for the upcoming talent calibration discussions.
Draft an impact assessment of the Unsworth departure—focusing on leadership coverage and transition timelines—to share with Claire.
Establish a regular cadence for documenting major organizational shifts and alignment meetings in your Google Drive folder.
2fk88oufebop7au89hmqmgtets.title: Monthly 1:1 w/Claire Veitenheimer | Mark Francis

kbeu6f5qk77i3qnk2bvf7id68c.summary: You must review the architecture updates from your May 29 meeting with Ray—specifically targeting data framework transitions and stalled business engagement processes—to prep for your sync with Sai. Although Sai is not explicitly named in the latest work notes, the critical path items—including the telematics data migration and the governance of unplanned pilots—require immediate alignment. Use these recent operational friction points to establish clear architecture ownership and process boundaries during your monthly session.
tasks: Establish a steady-state framework—trickle/streaming versus bulk—for loading the 2025 Telematics Data (MFP) and transitioning to AWS/Iceberg/Domino Nexus.
Formulate a standardized engagement process—including formal meetings and minutes—to hold business partners accountable and involve architecture earlier in pilot projects.
Resolve the stalled Resiliency/NART pilots by defining a clear PO3 process mapping or scheduling a level-set meeting with Deepak.
Address AI/LLM governance by proposing consumption-based chargebacks to curb the unnecessary use of high-end models.
kbeu6f5qk77i3qnk2bvf7id68c.title: Monthly Architecture Sync with Sai | Mark Francis (series ends...

d77heje02knkvg9t8hkt61ekps.summary: Review the 'Work Notes' folder—specifically the Ray 5-29 transcript—to address the stalling Resiliency/NART pilots. Schedule the alignment meeting with Deepak—you must level-set with him and key stakeholders to map the PO3 process and determine ownership. Resolve the broader operational hurdles—including paused telematics forensics, unplanned TiVo projects, and AI governance chargebacks—to prevent further business friction.
tasks: Schedule the alignment meeting with Deepak and stakeholders to map the PO3 process for the Resiliency/NART pilots.
Establish a consistent business engagement framework to hold partners accountable for process requirements and ownership.
Define the steady-state framework for 2025 telematics data ingestion and the migration to AWS, Iceberg, and Domino Nexus.
Implement consumption-based chargebacks to regulate the use of expensive AI and LLM models.
Revise the ServiceNow POC slide deck by hiding slides 6, 7, 15, and 515 before presenting to leadership.
